message:
feat(net): add web router, middleware, session, SSE, multipart, CORS, CSRF, static files

Closes bd-yx9r.10.2. Implements the full web application surface:

- Router: path-based routing with method dispatch, 404/405 handling
- Middleware: layered chain with next-handler delegation
- Extraction: query string parsing, header extraction
- Session: cookie-based session store with create/get/set/destroy
- SSE: server-sent events stream with push/poll lifecycle
- Multipart: form field and file upload parsing
- CORS: origin allowlist, wildcard, credential headers
- CSRF: deterministic token generation and validation
- Static files: content-type aware file serving

30 unit tests covering all surfaces. 130 test suites total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -192,7 +192,8 @@ NET_SRC := \
 	src/net/websocket.c \
 	src/net/quic.c \
 	src/net/server.c \
-	src/net/http.c
+	src/net/http.c \
+	src/net/web.c
 
 BYTES_SRC := \
 	src/bytes/buf.c \
